title: Bellamy Stands in Luffy's Way
description: Pages 11–15 focus on bellamy stands in luffy's way, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as luffy reaches Law again, but Doflamingo and Bellamy stand between the alliance and the final confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Leo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn it! You bloody drawaves, I won't forget this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please, be care-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi! Are you alright !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I WON'T FORGET! I WON'T FOR- EH?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We cannot fly, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can float!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Please, try to land on a roof!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you kick off the roofs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You will rise up again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I feel like a balloon ~!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: where..!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Also, everyone, please, keep an eye out for attacks from below !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: 4th level, sunflower fields

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We're aiming for the sunflower fields on the 4th level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Roger that!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Fraland! We've got an idea of how to open the lock to the factory!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Really, Tontatta!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: On top of the stone statue of Pica

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Please, stop senior!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Got it! Leave him to me!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: town - SABO vs. FUJITORA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: WAA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: At the foot of the Royal Palace, second level

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi, Straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: CAB- Bage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What do ya want!? Don't get in my way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Listen to my plan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hey, doffy~ where'd you send the "thread Joker" off to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I had some- thing I needed to deliver, but it looks like I wasn't able to accomplish the job.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: "You two...do you remember the day you first met law?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Uhahaha! He was freakin' crazy! His eyes had the crazy in them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: He resembled the young me...I had a feeling...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: In just 10 years he'd be my right-hand man.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: that I have to kill him today with my own hands is really such a shame.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Intruder!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Don't touch him! He's wrapped himself in bombs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Let me join your pirate crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Oi, what the hell is this? Who let this runt in here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I want to destroy everything I lay eyes on....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: My town... my house... humans!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I want to destroy it all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I was raised in the white city...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I don't have...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Much longer to live...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: We will be on hiatus next issue. We will resume publication in issue 34.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Ch. 752 end

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: - Exactly what hides in law's past!?

summary: Bellamy Stands in Luffy's Way develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
